summary: Phase 1 — i18n Keys: Added 'contact.float.label_whatsapp' and 'contact.float.aria_whatsapp' to src/i18n/es.ts and src/i18n/en.ts; added 'contact.float.label_redbook' and 'contact.float.aria_redbook' to src/i18n/zh.ts.

Phase 2 — Component: Created src/components/ContactFloat.astro (144 lines), a self-contained FAB component with WhatsApp (green) for es/en locales and RedBook (red #FF2442) for zh locale. Includes CSS-only hover pill label expansion, reduced-motion support, and mobile positioning to avoid cookie banner overlap.

Phase 3 — BaseLayout Integration: Imported ContactFloat into src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro, removed the old #wa-float <a> element, its <style> block (display:none, mobile-only, scroll-gated), and the scroll-listener <script>. Replaced with <ContactFloat lang={lang} /> before the Calendly script.

Error Fix (Stats.astro): Fixed pre-existing ts(2339) errors at lines 26 and 29 by explicitly typing the stats array as '{ value: number; suffix: string; label: string; target: string; noCount?: boolean }[]', making noCount an optional property on the stat objects — no type assertions used.

Error Fix (404.astro): Fixed pre-existing ts(2322) error by removing invalid props (t, pageTitle, pageDescription, canonicalUrl) and replacing them with the correct BaseLayout Props interface fields (title, description, ogUrl). Also removed the unused 'es' i18n import and 't' function.

Phase 4 — Final Validation: astro check reports 0 errors and 0 warnings (11 informational hints only). astro build completes with zero errors; all 7 pages built successfully (/, /en/, /zh/, /404, and sub-pages).
